name: Kent County Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Kent County Community Center in Worton, MD! There are 6 courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Kent County Family YMCA
description: Kent County Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Chestertown, MD. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Roundtop Park
description: Come play pickleball at Roundtop Park in Chestertown, MD! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
